units.source: Microstructural Features
units.translation: 市场微观结构特征

units.source: 19.1 Motivation
units.translation: 19.1 为什么要研究市场微观结构

units.source: Market microstructure studies “the process and outcomes of exchanging assets under explicit trading rules” (O’Hara
units.translation: 市场微观结构研究的是“在明确交易规则下交换资产的过程及其结果”（O’Hara

units.source: ). Microstructural datasets include primary information about the auctioning process, like order cancellations, double auction book, queues, partial fills, aggressor side, corrections, replacements, etc. The main source is Financial Information eXchange (FIX) messages, which can be purchased from exchanges. The level of detail contained in FIX messages provides researchers with the ability to understand how market participants conceal and reveal their intentions. That makes microstructural data one of the most important ingredients for building predictive ML features.
units.translation: ）。微观结构数据集记录了竞价过程中的原始信息，例如撤单、双边竞价订单簿、排队次序、部分成交、主动成交方、成交更正和订单替换等。最主要的数据来源是金融信息交换（FIX）消息，通常可向交易所购买。FIX 消息非常细致，使研究者能够分析市场参与者如何隐藏或暴露自己的交易意图。因此，微观结构数据是构造具有预测力的机器学习特征时最重要的原料之一。

units.source: 19.2 Review Of The Literature
units.translation: 19.2 文献回顾

units.source: The depth and complexity of market microstructure theories has evolved over time, as a function of the amount and variety of the data available. The first generation of models used solely price information. The two foundational results from those early days are trade classification models (like the tick rule) and the Roll
units.translation: 随着可用数据越来越多、种类越来越丰富，市场微观结构理论也不断加深并变得更复杂。第一代模型只使用价格信息，当时的两项奠基性成果是交易方向分类模型（如 tick rule）和 Roll

units.source: model. The second generation of models came after volume datasets started to become available, and researchers shifted their attention to study the impact that volume has on prices. Two examples for this generation of models are Kyle
units.translation: 模型。成交量数据出现后，第二代模型随之诞生，研究重点转向成交量对价格的影响。这一代的代表包括 Kyle

units.source: and Amihud
units.translation: 和 Amihud

units.source: . The third generation of models came after 1996, when Maureen O’Hara, David Easley, and others published their “probability of informed trading” (PIN) theory (Easley et al.
units.translation: 模型。第三代模型始于 1996 年之后，当时 Maureen O’Hara、David Easley 等人发表了“知情交易概率”（PIN）理论（Easley 等

units.source: ). This constituted a major breakthrough, because PIN explained the bid-ask spread as the consequence of a sequential strategic decision between liquidity providers (market makers) and position takers (informed traders). Essentially, it illustrated that market makers were sellers of the option to be adversely selected by informed traders, and the bid-ask spread is the premium they charge for that option. Easley et al. [2012a, 2012b] explain how to estimate VPIN, a high-frequency estimate of PIN under volume-based sampling. These are the main theoretical frameworks used by the microstructural literature. O’Hara
units.translation: ）。这是一次重大突破，因为 PIN 把买卖价差解释为流动性提供者（做市商）与流动性需求方（知情交易者）依次进行策略决策的结果。实质上，做市商卖出了一份“可能被知情交易者逆向选择”的期权，而买卖价差就是他们收取的期权费。Easley 等人 [2012a, 2012b] 说明了如何估计 VPIN，也就是在成交量采样下对 PIN 作出的高频估计。以上构成了微观结构文献的主要理论框架。O’Hara

units.source: and Hasbrouck
units.translation: 和 Hasbrouck

units.source: offer a good compendium of low-frequency microstructural models. Easley et al.
units.translation: 对低频微观结构模型作了很好的汇总。Easley 等人

units.source: present a modern treatment of high-frequency microstructural models.
units.translation: 则从现代视角系统介绍了高频微观结构模型。

units.source: 19.3 First Generation: Price Sequences
units.translation: 19.3 第一代模型：价格序列

units.source: The first generation of microstructural models concerned themselves with estimating the bid-ask spread and volatility as proxies for illiquidity. They did so with limited data and without imposing a strategic or sequential structure to the trading process.
units.translation: 第一代微观结构模型主要估计买卖价差和波动率，并把它们作为非流动性的替代指标。受数据条件所限，这些模型没有为交易过程设置策略互动或先后顺序结构。

units.source: 19.3.1 The Tick Rule
units.translation: 19.3.1 逐笔价格变动规则（Tick Rule）

units.source: In a double auction book, quotes are placed for selling a security at various price levels (offers) or for buying a security at various price levels (bids). Offer prices always exceed bid prices, because otherwise there would be an instant match. A trade occurs whenever a buyer matches an offer, or a seller matches a bid. Every trade has a buyer and a seller, but only one side initiates the trade. The tick rule is an algorithm used to determine a trade's aggressor side. A buy-initiated trade is labeled “1”, and a sell-initiated trade is labeled “-1”, according to this logic:
units.translation: 在双边竞价订单簿中，参与者会在不同价格挂出卖出证券的报价（卖价），也会挂出买入证券的报价（买价）。卖价总是高于买价，否则订单会立即撮合。买方接受卖价，或卖方接受买价时，就会发生交易。每笔交易都有买卖双方，但只有一方主动发起成交。tick rule 用来识别这笔交易的主动成交方：买方主动成交记为“1”，卖方主动成交记为“-1”，规则如下：

units.translation: 任意设为 1。多项研究发现，尽管 tick rule 十分简单，其分类准确率依然很高（Aitken 和 Frino

units.source: ). Competing classification methods include Lee and Ready
units.translation: ）。其他交易方向分类方法包括 Lee 和 Ready

units.translation: 以及 Easley 等人

units.source: 19.3.2 The Roll Model
units.translation: 19.3.2 Roll 模型

units.source: Roll
units.translation: Roll

units.source: was one of the first models to propose an explanation for the effective bid-ask spread at which a security trades. This is useful in that bid-ask spreads are a function of liquidity, hence Roll's model can be seen as an early attempt to measure the liquidity of a security. Consider a mid-price series
units.translation: 模型是最早解释证券有效买卖价差的模型之一。由于买卖价差取决于流动性，Roll 模型也可视为早期衡量证券流动性的一次尝试。考虑中间价序列

units.source: These assumptions are, of course, against all empirical observations, which suggest that financial time series have a drift, they are heteroscedastic, exhibit serial dependency, and their returns distribution is non-Normal. But with a proper sampling procedure, as we saw in Chapter 2, these assumptions may not be too unrealistic. The observed prices,
units.translation: 这些假设当然与经验事实并不相符：金融时间序列通常存在漂移和异方差，具有序列相关性，其收益分布也不是正态分布。不过，正如第 2 章所述，只要采用合适的采样方法，这些假设未必离现实太远。观测到的价格

units.translation: ；各期方向相互独立，即

units.translation: ；并且交易方向与噪声相互独立，即

units.source: . In conclusion, the bid-ask spread is a function of the serial covariance of price changes, and the true (unobserved) price's noise, excluding microstructural noise, is a function of the observed noise and the serial covariance of price changes.
units.translation: 。也就是说，买卖价差取决于价格变动的序列协方差；而剔除微观结构噪声后的真实（不可观测）价格噪声，则取决于观测噪声和价格变动的序列协方差。

units.source: 19.3.3 High-Low Volatility Estimator
units.translation: 19.3.3 最高—最低价波动率估计量

units.source: Beckers
units.translation: Beckers

units.source: shows that volatility estimators based on high-low prices are more accurate than the standard estimators of volatility based on closing prices. Parkinson
units.translation: 指出，基于最高价与最低价的波动率估计，比基于收盘价的标准估计更准确。Parkinson

units.translation: 证明：若连续观测的价格服从几何布朗运动，则

units.translation: 表示价格柱的最高价，柱编号为

units.translation: 表示价格柱的最低价，柱编号为

units.translation: 。于是，波动率特征

units.source: can be robustly estimated based on observed high-low prices.
units.translation: 可以根据观测到的最高价和最低价稳健估计。

units.source: 19.3.4 Corwin and Schultz
units.translation: 19.3.4 Corwin–Schultz 估计量

units.source: Building on the work of Beckers
units.translation: 在 Beckers

units.source: , Corwin and Schultz
units.translation: 研究的基础上，Corwin 和 Schultz

units.source: introduce a bid-ask spread estimator from high and low prices. The estimator is based on two principles: First, high prices are almost always matched against the offer, and low prices are almost always matched against the bid. The ratio of high-to-low prices reflects fundamental volatility as well as the bid-ask spread. Second, the component of the high-to-low price ratio that is due to volatility increases proportionately with the time elapsed between two observations. Corwin and Schultz show that the spread, as a percentage of price, can be estimated as
units.translation: 提出了一个利用最高价和最低价估计买卖价差的方法。它基于两条原理。第一，最高价几乎总是由买方接受卖价而形成，最低价则几乎总是由卖方接受买价而形成。因此，最高价与最低价之比既包含基本面波动，也包含买卖价差。第二，在这一价格比率中，由波动率造成的部分会随两次观测间隔成比例增加。Corwin 和 Schultz 证明，以价格百分比表示的价差可估计为

units.source: is the high price over 2 bars
units.translation: 是两个价格柱

units.source: , whereas
units.translation: 内的最高价，而

units.source: is the low price over 2 bars
units.translation: 是这两个价格柱

units.source: . Because
units.translation: 内的最低价。由于

units.source: , the authors recommend setting negative alphas to 0 (see Corwin and Schultz
units.translation: ，作者建议把负的 alpha 截断为 0（见 Corwin 和 Schultz

units.source: , p. 727). Snippet 19.1 implements this algorithm. The corwinSchultz function receives two arguments, a series dataframe with columns (High, Low), and an integer value
units.translation: ，第 727 页）。代码片段 19.1 实现了该算法。corwinSchultz 函数接收两个参数：一个包含 High、Low 两列的序列 DataFrame，以及整数

units.source: Snippet 19.1: Implementation of the Corwin-Schultz Algorithm
units.translation: 代码片段 19.1：Corwin–Schultz 算法的实现

units.translation: 复制

units.source: Note that volatility does not appear in the final Corwin-Schultz equations. The reason is that volatility has been replaced by its high/low estimator. As a byproduct of this model, we can derive the Becker-Parkinson volatility as shown in Snippet 19.2.
units.translation: 注意，最终的 Corwin–Schultz 方程中不再显式出现波动率，因为它已被最高价／最低价估计量替代。作为该模型的附带结果，还可以推导出 Becker–Parkinson 波动率，见代码片段 19.2。

units.source: Snippet 19.2: Estimating Volatility for High-low Prices
units.translation: 代码片段 19.2：利用最高价和最低价估计波动率

units.source: This procedure is particularly helpful in the corporate bond market, where there is no centralized order book, and trades occur through bids wanted in competition (BWIC). The resulting feature, bid-ask spread S, can be estimated recursively over a rolling window, and values can be smoothed using a Kalman filter.
units.translation: 该方法对公司债市场尤其有用：这类市场没有集中式订单簿，交易通常通过竞价征询（BWIC）完成。由此得到的买卖价差特征 S 可以在滚动窗口中递归估计，再用卡尔曼滤波平滑。

units.source: 19.4 Second Generation: Strategic Trade Models
units.translation: 19.4 第二代模型：策略交易模型

units.source: Second generation microstructural models focus on understanding and measuring illiquidity. Illiquidity is an important informative feature in financial ML models, because it is a risk that has an associated premium. These models have a stronger theoretical foundation than first-generation models, in that they explain trading as the strategic interaction between informed and uninformed traders. In doing so, they pay attention to signed volume and order flow imbalance. Most of these features are estimated through regressions. In practice, I have observed that the t-values associated with these microstructural estimates are more informative than the (mean) estimates themselves. Although the literature does not mention this observation, there is a good argument for preferring features based on t-values over features based on mean values: t-values are re-scaled by the standard deviation of the estimation error, which incorporates another dimension of information absent in mean estimates.
units.translation: 第二代微观结构模型侧重理解并衡量非流动性。非流动性带有风险溢价，因此是金融机器学习模型中很重要的信息特征。这些模型的理论基础比第一代更扎实：它们把交易解释为知情交易者与非知情交易者之间的策略互动，并重点考察带符号成交量和订单流失衡。此类特征大多通过回归估计。我的实践经验是，这些微观结构估计量对应的 t 值往往比参数均值本身更有信息。文献虽然没有强调这一点，但偏好 t 值特征是有道理的：t 值会用估计误差的标准差重新缩放参数，从而加入均值估计中没有的另一维信息。

units.source: 19.4.1 Kyle’s Lambda
units.translation: 19.4.1 Kyle 的 Lambda

units.source: Kyle
units.translation: Kyle

units.source: introduced the following strategic trade model. Consider a risky asset with terminal value

The market maker observes the total order flow
units.translation: 做市商观察总订单流

units.translation: ，并据此设定价格

units.source: accordingly. In this model, market makers cannot distinguish between orders from noise traders and informed traders. They adjust prices as a function of the order flow imbalance, as that may indicate the presence of an informed trader. Hence, there is a positive relationship between price change and order flow imbalance, which is called market impact. The informed trader conjectures that the market maker has a linear price adjustment function,
units.translation: 。在该模型中，做市商无法分辨订单来自噪声交易者还是知情交易者。订单流失衡可能意味着知情交易者出现，因此做市商会随订单流失衡调整价格。于是，价格变动与订单流失衡呈正相关，这种关系称为市场冲击。知情交易者猜测做市商采用线性价格调整函数：

units.source: 19.4.2 Amihud’s Lambda
units.translation: 19.4.2 Amihud 的 Lambda

units.source: Amihud
units.translation: Amihud

units.source: studies the positive relationship between absolute returns and illiquidity. In particular, he computes the daily price response associated with one dollar of trading volume, and argues its value is a proxy of price impact. One possible implementation of this idea is

units.translation: 涉及的美元成交额。虽然这一指标看似简单，Hasbrouck

units.source: found that daily Amihud's lambda estimates exhibit a high rank correlation to intraday estimates of effective spread. Figure 19.2 plots the histogram of Amihud's lambdas estimated on the E-mini S&P 500 futures series.
units.translation: 却发现，Amihud Lambda 的日度估计值与有效价差的日内估计值具有很高的秩相关性。图 19.2 给出了在 E-mini 标普 500 期货序列上估计所得 Amihud Lambda 的直方图。

units.source: Figure 19.2: Amihud’s lambdas estimated on E-mini S&P 500 futures
units.translation: 图 19.2：基于 E-mini 标普 500 期货估计的 Amihud Lambda

units.source: 19.4.3 Hasbrouck’s Lambda
units.translation: 19.4.3 Hasbrouck 的 Lambda

units.source: Hasbrouck
units.translation: Hasbrouck

units.source: follows up on Kyle’s and Amihud’s ideas, and applies them to estimating the price impact coefficient based on trade-and-quote (TAQ) data. He uses a Gibbs sampler to produce a Bayesian estimation of the regression specification
units.translation: 沿用 Kyle 和 Amihud 的思路，把它们用于根据成交与报价（TAQ）数据估计价格冲击系数。他使用 Gibbs 采样器，对下列回归模型进行贝叶斯估计：

units.source: for security
units.translation: ，对应证券

units.source: , with
units.translation: ，其中

units.source: indicates whether trade
units.translation: 表示交易

units.source: was buy-initiated or sell-initiated; and
units.translation: 由买方还是卖方主动发起；

units.source: . We can then estimate
units.translation: 涉及的美元成交额。随后可以估计

units.source: for every security
units.translation: ，对每只证券

units.source: , and use it as a feature that approximates the effective cost of trading (market impact). Consistent with most of the literature, Hasbrouck recommends 5-minute time-bars for sampling ticks. However, for the reasons discussed in Chapter 2, better results can be achieved through stochastic sampling methods that are synchronized with market activity. Figure 19.3 plots the histogram of Hasbrouck's lambdas estimated on the E-mini S&P 500 futures series.
units.translation: 都能得到相应估计，并将其作为近似衡量实际交易成本（市场冲击）的特征。与大多数文献一致，Hasbrouck 建议用 5 分钟时间柱对逐笔数据采样。不过，基于第 2 章讨论的原因，采用与市场活动同步的随机采样方法往往效果更好。图 19.3 给出了在 E-mini 标普 500 期货序列上估计所得 Hasbrouck Lambda 的直方图。

units.source: Figure 19.3: Hasbrouck’s lambdas estimated on E-mini S&P 500 futures
units.translation: 图 19.3：基于 E-mini 标普 500 期货估计的 Hasbrouck Lambda

units.source: 19.5 Third Generation: Sequential Trade Models
units.translation: 19.5 第三代模型：序贯交易模型

units.source: As we have seen in the previous section, strategic trade models feature a single informed trader who can trade at multiple times. In this section we will discuss an alternative kind of model, where randomly selected traders arrive at the market sequentially and independently. Since their appearance, sequential trade models have become very popular among market makers. One reason is, they incorporate the sources of uncertainty faced by liquidity providers, namely the probability that an informational event has taken place, the probability that such event is negative, the arrival rate of noise traders, and the arrival rate of informed traders. With those variables, market makers must update quotes dynamically, and manage their inventories.
units.translation: 上一节的策略交易模型只有一名知情交易者，但他可以多次交易。本节讨论另一类模型：随机抽中的交易者依次、独立地进入市场。序贯交易模型问世后很受做市商欢迎，一个原因是它把流动性提供者面对的主要不确定性都纳入模型，包括信息事件发生的概率、该事件为坏消息的概率、噪声交易者的到达率，以及知情交易者的到达率。做市商必须根据这些变量动态更新报价并管理库存。

units.source: 19.5.1 Probability of Information-based Trading
units.translation: 19.5.1 知情交易概率

units.source: Easley et al.
units.translation: Easley 等人

units.translation: 。为避免因知情交易者而亏损，做市商的盈亏平衡买价为

units.source: are estimated at that point in time. The authors apply a Bayesian updating process to incorporate information after each trade arrives to the market.

units.source: In order to determine the value

units.translation: 是以卖价成交的成交量（买方主动成交），

units.source: 19.5.2 Volume-Synchronized Probability of Informed Trading
units.translation: 19.5.2 成交量同步知情交易概率

units.source: proved that
units.translation: 证明

units.source: and in particular, for a sufficiently large
units.translation: 特别地，若取足够大的参数

units.source: proposed a high-frequency estimate of PIN, which they named volume-synchronized probability of informed trading (VPIN). This procedure adopts a volume clock, which synchronizes the data sampling with market activity, as captured by volume (see Chapter 2). We can then estimate
units.translation: 提出了 PIN 的高频估计量，称为成交量同步知情交易概率（VPIN）。该方法采用成交量时钟，以成交量刻画市场活动，并让数据采样与市场活动同步（见第 2 章）。于是可以估计

units.source: is the sum of volumes from buy-initiated trades within volume bar
units.translation: 表示买方主动成交量之和，所在成交量柱编号为

units.translation: 表示卖方主动成交量之和，所在成交量柱编号为

units.source: is the number of bars used to produce this estimate. Because all volume bars are of the same size,
units.translation: 是估计所用的成交量柱数量。由于所有成交量柱大小都相同，均为

units.translation: ，按照定义必有

units.translation: 因此，PIN 的高频估计量为

units.source: For additional details and case studies of VPIN, see Easley et al.
units.translation: 有关 VPIN 的更多细节和案例研究，参见 Easley 等人

units.source: . Using linear regressions, Andersen and Bondarenko
units.translation: 。Andersen 和 Bondarenko

units.source: concluded that VPIN is not a good predictor of volatility. However, a number of studies have found that VPIN indeed has predictive power: Abad and Yague
units.translation: 通过线性回归得出结论，认为 VPIN 不能很好地预测波动率。不过，也有多项研究发现 VPIN 确实具有预测力，例如 Abad 和 Yague

units.source: , Bethel et al.
units.translation: 、Bethel 等人

units.source: , Cheung et al.
units.translation: 、Cheung 等人

units.source: , Kim et al.
units.translation: 、Kim 等人

units.source: , Song et al.
units.translation: 、Song 等人

units.source: , Van Ness et al.
units.translation: 、Van Ness 等人

units.source: , and Wei et al.
units.translation: 以及 Wei 等人

units.source: , to cite a few. In any case, linear regression is a technique that was already known to 18th-century mathematicians (Stigler
units.translation: 等。无论如何，线性回归早在 18 世纪就已为数学家所知（Stigler

units.source: ), and economists should not be surprised when it fails to recognize complex non-linear patterns in 21st-century financial markets.
units.translation: ）；当它无法识别 21 世纪金融市场中的复杂非线性模式时，经济学家不应感到意外。

units.source: 19.6 Additional Features from Microstructural Datasets
units.translation: 19.6 微观结构数据集中的其他特征

units.source: The features we have studied in Sections 19.3 to 19.5 were suggested by market microstructure theory. In addition, we should consider alternative features that, although not suggested by the theory, we suspect carry important information about the way market participants operate, and their future intentions. In doing so, we will harness the power of ML algorithms, which can learn how to use these features without being specifically directed by theory.
units.translation: 第 19.3 至 19.5 节讨论的特征都来自市场微观结构理论。除此之外，还应考虑一些理论没有直接提出、但可能包含市场参与者行为方式和未来意图的重要特征。这样可以发挥机器学习算法的优势：即使理论没有明确规定用法，算法也能自行学习如何利用这些特征。

units.source: 19.6.1 Distribution of Order Sizes
units.translation: 19.6.1 订单规模分布

units.source: study the frequency of trades per trade size, and find that trades with round sizes are abnormally frequent. For example, the frequency rates quickly decay as a function of trade size, with the exception of round trade sizes
units.translation: 研究了不同成交规模的出现频率，发现整数档规模的交易异常频繁。一般来说，成交规模越大，出现频率会迅速下降，但下列整数量级的成交除外：

units.source: . These authors attribute this phenomenon to so-called “mouse” or “GUI” traders, that is, human traders who send orders by clicking buttons on a GUI (Graphical User Interface). In the case of the E-mini S&P 500, for example, size 10 is 2.9 times more frequent than size 9; size 50 is 10.9 times more likely than size 49; size 100 is 16.8 times more frequent than size 99; size 200 is 27.2 times more likely than size 199; size 250 is 32.5 times more frequent than size 249; size 500 is 57.1 times more frequent than size 499. Such patterns are not typical of “silicon traders,” who usually are programmed to randomize trades to disguise their footprint in markets. A useful feature may be to determine the normal frequency of round-sized trades, and monitor deviations from that expected value. The ML algorithm could, for example, determine if a larger-than-usual proportion of round-sized trades is associated with trends, as human traders tend to bet with a fundamental view, belief, or conviction. Conversely, a lower-than-usual proportion of round-sized trades may increase the likelihood that prices will move sideways, as silicon traders do not typically hold long-term views.
units.translation: 。作者把这种现象归因于所谓的“鼠标交易者”或“GUI 交易者”，也就是通过点击图形用户界面按钮发送订单的人类交易者。以 E-mini 标普 500 为例：规模 10 的成交频率是规模 9 的 2.9 倍；50 是 49 的 10.9 倍；100 是 99 的 16.8 倍；200 是 199 的 27.2 倍；250 是 249 的 32.5 倍；500 是 499 的 57.1 倍。这样的模式通常不会出现在“硅基交易者”（算法交易者）身上，因为算法往往会随机化订单规模，以掩盖自己在市场中的足迹。一个有用的特征是先确定整数量级成交的正常频率，再监测实际值偏离该期望的程度。例如，机器学习算法可以判断：高于平常的整数规模成交占比是否与趋势行情相关，因为人类交易者往往基于基本面观点、信念或确信程度下注。反之，整数规模成交占比低于平常时，价格横盘的可能性也许更高，因为算法交易者通常不持有长期观点。

units.source: 19.6.2 Cancellation Rates, Limit Orders, Market Orders
units.translation: 19.6.2 撤单率、限价单与市价单

units.source: Eisler et al.
units.translation: Eisler 等人

units.source: study the impact of market orders, limit orders, and quote cancellations. These authors find that small stocks respond differently than large stocks to these events. They conclude that measuring these magnitudes is relevant to model the dynamics of the bid-ask spread. Easley et al.
units.translation: 研究了市价单、限价单和撤销报价造成的影响。他们发现，小盘股与大盘股对这些事件的反应不同，因此，要刻画买卖价差的动态变化，就有必要衡量这些量。Easley 等人

units.source: also argue that large quote cancellation rates may be indicative of low liquidity, as participants are publishing quotes that do not intend to get filled. They discuss four categories of predatory algorithms:
units.translation: 还指出，撤单率很高可能意味着流动性不足，因为参与者发布的报价本来就无意成交。他们讨论了四类掠夺性算法：

units.source: Quote stuffers:
units.translation: 报价填塞者（quote stuffers）：

units.source: They engage in “latency arbitrage.” Their strategy involves overwhelming an exchange with messages, with the sole intention of slowing down competing algorithms, which are forced to parse messages that only the originators know can be ignored.
units.translation: 这类算法从事“延迟套利”。它们向交易所灌入海量消息，唯一目的就是拖慢竞争算法；其他算法不得不解析这些消息，只有发送者自己知道哪些消息可以忽略。

units.source: Quote danglers:
units.translation: 诱饵报价者（quote danglers）：

units.source: This strategy sends quotes that force a squeezed trader to chase a price against her interests. O’Hara [2011] presents evidence of their disruptive activities.
units.translation: 这类策略发出诱饵报价，迫使受挤压的交易者朝不利于自己的方向追价。O’Hara [2011] 给出了其扰乱市场活动的证据。

units.source: Liquidity squeezers:
units.translation: 流动性挤压者（liquidity squeezers）：

units.source: When a distressed large investor is forced to unwind her position, predatory algorithms trade in the same direction, draining as much liquidity as possible. As a result, prices overshoot and they make a profit (Carlin et al. [2007]).
units.translation: 当陷入困境的大型投资者被迫平仓时，掠夺性算法会顺着同一方向交易，尽可能抽干流动性。结果是价格出现超调，而这些算法从中获利（Carlin 等人 [2007]）。

units.source: Pack hunters:
units.translation: 群猎者（pack hunters）：

units.source: Predators hunting independently become aware of one another's activities, and form a pack in order to maximize the chances of triggering a cascading effect (Donefer [2010], Fabozzi et al. [2011], Jarrow and Protter [2011]). NANEX [2011] shows what appears to be pack hunters forcing a stop loss. Although their individual actions are too small to raise the regulator's suspicion, their collective action may be market-manipulative. When that is the case, it is very hard to prove their collusion, since they coordinate in a decentralized, spontaneous manner.
units.translation: 原本各自行动的掠夺者察觉到彼此后，会结成“猎群”，以最大限度提高触发连锁反应的概率（Donefer [2010]、Fabozzi 等人 [2011]、Jarrow 和 Protter [2011]）。NANEX [2011] 展示了一个疑似群猎者逼出止损的案例。单个算法的动作很小，不足以引起监管机构怀疑，但合在一起却可能构成市场操纵。即便如此，也很难证明它们串谋，因为这种协同行为是去中心化、自发形成的。

units.source: These predatory algorithms utilize quote cancellations and various order types in an attempt to adversely select market makers. They leave different signatures in the trading record, and measuring the rates of quote cancellation, limit orders, and market orders can be the basis for useful features, informative of their intentions.
units.translation: 这些掠夺性算法利用撤销报价和不同订单类型，试图对做市商实施逆向选择。它们会在交易记录中留下各自不同的痕迹。衡量撤单、限价单和市价单的出现频率，可以据此构造反映其意图的有用特征。

units.source: 19.6.3 Time-Weighted Average Price Execution Algorithms
units.translation: 19.6.3 时间加权平均价格执行算法

units.source: demonstrate how to recognize the presence of execution algorithms that target a particular time-weighted average price (TWAP). A TWAP algorithm is an algorithm that slices a large order into small ones, which are submitted at regular time intervals, in an attempt to achieve a pre-defined time-weighted average price. These authors take a sample of E-mini S&P 500 futures trades between November 7, 2010, and November 7, 2011. They divide the day into 24 hours, and for every hour, they add the volume traded at each second, irrespective of the minute. Then they plot these aggregate volumes as a surface where the x-axis is assigned to volume per second, the y-axis is assigned to hour of the day, and the z-axis is assigned to the aggregate volume. This analysis allows us to see the distribution of volume within each minute as the day passes, and search for low-frequency traders executing their massive orders on a chronological time-space. The largest concentrations of volume within a minute tend to occur during the first few seconds, for almost every hour of the day. This is particularly true at 00:00–01:00 GMT (around the open of Asian markets), 05:00–09:00 GMT (around the open of U.K. and European equities), 13:00–15:00 GMT (around the open of U.S. equities), and 20:00–21:00 GMT (around the close of U.S. equities). A useful ML feature may be to evaluate the order imbalance at the beginning of every minute, and determine whether there is a persistent component. This can then be used to front-run large institutional investors, while the larger portion of their TWAP order is still pending.
units.translation: 展示了如何识别以特定时间加权平均价格（TWAP）为目标的执行算法。TWAP 算法会把大额订单拆成许多小单，按固定时间间隔提交，以争取实现预先设定的时间加权平均价格。作者选取了 2010 年 11 月 7 日至 2011 年 11 月 7 日的 E-mini 标普 500 期货成交样本。他们把一天分为 24 个小时；对每个小时，忽略分钟差异，把发生在同一秒位置的成交量相加。然后把汇总成交量画成曲面：横轴为每秒成交量，纵轴为一天中的小时，竖轴为汇总成交量。这样便能观察一天之中每分钟内部的成交量分布，并在“时间顺序—日内时点”空间中寻找正在执行大额订单的低频交易者。几乎在一天的每个小时，每分钟内最大的成交量都集中在最初几秒。以下时段尤其明显：格林尼治时间 00:00—01:00（亚洲市场开盘前后）、05:00—09:00（英国和欧洲股票市场开盘前后）、13:00—15:00（美国股票市场开盘前后）以及 20:00—21:00（美国股票市场收盘前后）。一个有用的机器学习特征是评估每分钟开始时的订单流失衡，并判断其中是否存在持续成分。若大型机构的 TWAP 订单还有很大一部分尚未执行，就可以利用该特征对大型机构进行抢先交易（front-running）。

units.source: 19.6.4 Options Markets
units.translation: 19.6.4 期权市场

units.source: Muravyev et al.
units.translation: Muravyev 等人

units.source: use microstructural information from U.S. stocks and options to study events where the two markets disagree. They characterize such disagreement by deriving the underlying bid-ask range implied by the put-call parity quotes and comparing it to the actual bid-ask range of the stock. They conclude that disagreements tend to be resolved in favor of stock quotes, meaning that option quotes do not contain economically significant information. At the same time, they do find that option trades contain information not included in the stock price. These findings will not come as a surprise to portfolio managers used to trade relatively illiquid products, including stock options. Quotes can remain irrational for prolonged periods of time, even as sparse prices are informative. Cremers and Weinbaum
units.translation: 利用美国股票与期权的微观结构信息，研究两个市场定价不一致的事件。他们先根据看涨—看跌期权平价关系的报价推导标的股票隐含买卖价区间，再与股票实际买卖价区间比较，以此刻画分歧。结论是，分歧往往最终以股票报价为准，这意味着期权报价不含有经济上显著的信息。不过，他们也发现期权的实际成交含有尚未反映在股价中的信息。经常交易股票期权等相对缺乏流动性产品的投资组合经理，对这一结果不会意外：报价可以长期不合理，而零星成交价格反倒具有信息。Cremers 和 Weinbaum

units.source: find that stocks with relatively expensive calls (stocks with both a high volatility spread and a high change in the volatility spread) outperform stocks with relatively expensive puts (stocks with both a low volatility spread and a low change in the volatility spread) by 50 basis points per week. This degree of predictability is larger when option liquidity is high and stock liquidity is low. In line with these observations, useful features can be extracted from computing the put-call implied stock price, derived from option trades. Futures prices only represent mean or expected future values. But option prices allow us to derive the entire distribution of outcomes being priced. An ML algorithm can search for patterns across the Greek letters quoted at various strikes and expiration dates.
units.translation: 发现，看涨期权相对昂贵的股票（波动率价差高且价差增幅也高），每周比看跌期权相对昂贵的股票（波动率价差低且价差增幅也低）多赚 50 个基点。当期权流动性高而股票流动性低时，这种可预测性更强。基于这些发现，可以利用期权成交推导看涨—看跌期权隐含股价，并据此构造有用特征。期货价格只能反映未来价值的均值或期望，而期权价格可以揭示市场定价的完整结果分布。机器学习算法还可以从不同执行价和到期日对应的各项希腊字母风险指标中寻找模式。

units.source: 19.6.5 Serial Correlation of Signed Order Flow
units.translation: 19.6.5 带符号订单流的序列相关性

units.source: Toth et al.
units.translation: Toth 等人

units.source: study the signed order flow of London Stock Exchange stocks, and find that order signs are positively autocorrelated for many days. They attribute this observation to two candidate explanations: Herding and order splitting. They conclude that on timescales of less than a few hours, the persistence of order flow is overwhelmingly due to splitting rather than herding. Given that market microstructure theory attributes the persistency of order flow imbalance to the presence of informed traders, it makes sense to measure the strength of such persistency through the serial correlation of the signed volumes. Such a feature would be complementary to the features we studied in Section 19.5.
units.translation: 研究了伦敦证券交易所股票的带符号订单流，发现订单方向会连续多日呈正自相关。他们提出两个可能解释：羊群行为和拆单。结论是，在短于数小时的时间尺度上，订单流的持续性几乎完全来自拆单，而不是羊群行为。市场微观结构理论把订单流失衡的持续性归因于知情交易者的存在，因此，用带符号成交量的序列相关性衡量这种持续性的强弱是合理的。该特征可以补充第 19.5 节讨论的特征。

units.source: 19.7 What Is Microstructural Information?
units.translation: 19.7 什么是微观结构信息？

units.source: Let me conclude this chapter by addressing what I consider to be a major flaw in the market microstructure literature. Most articles and books on this subject study asymmetric information, and how strategic agents utilize it to profit from market makers. But how is information exactly defined in the context of trading? Unfortunately, there is no widely accepted definition of information in a microstructural sense, and the literature uses this concept in a surprisingly loose, rather informal way (López de Prado
units.translation: 本章最后讨论我认为市场微观结构文献中的一个重大缺陷。这个领域的大多数论文和著作都研究信息不对称，以及策略参与者如何利用信息从做市商手中获利。但在交易语境下，“信息”究竟是什么？遗憾的是，微观结构意义上的信息没有广泛接受的定义，文献对这个概念的使用也出人意料地宽松而不严谨（López de Prado

units.source: ). This section proposes a proper definition of information, founded on signal processing, that can be applied to microstructural studies.
units.translation: ）。本节将以信号处理为基础，给出一个可用于微观结构研究的严格信息定义。

units.source: Consider a features matrix
units.translation: 考虑特征矩阵

units.source: that contains information typically used by market makers to determine whether they should provide liquidity at a particular level, or cancel their passive quotes. For example, the columns could be all of the features discussed in this chapter, like VPIN, Kyle's lambda, cancellation rates, etc. Matrix
units.translation: ，其中包含做市商通常用来判断应在某一价位提供流动性、还是撤掉被动报价的信息。例如，各列可以是本章讨论的 VPIN、Kyle Lambda、撤单率等特征。矩阵

units.source: has one row for each decision point. For example, a market maker may reconsider the decision to either provide liquidity or pull out of the market every time 10,000 contracts are traded, or whenever there is a significant change in prices (recall sampling methods in Chapter 2), etc. First, we derive an array
units.translation: 的每一行对应一个决策时点。例如，每成交 10,000 份合约，或价格发生显著变化时（回想第 2 章的采样方法），做市商都可以重新决定是继续提供流动性还是退出市场。第一步，构造数组

units.source: that assigns a label 1 to an observation that resulted in a market-making profit, and labels as 0 an observation that resulted in a market-making loss (see Chapter 3 for labeling methods). Second, we fit a classifier on the training set
units.translation: ：若某个观测最终使做市获利，则标记为 1；若导致做市亏损，则标记为 0（标记方法见第 3 章）。第二步，在训练集

units.source: . Third, as new out-of-sample observations arrive
units.translation: 上拟合分类器。第三步，当新的样本外观测在时点

units.source: , we use the fit classifier to predict the label
units.translation: 到来时，用拟合好的分类器预测标签

units.source: . Fourth, we derive the cross-entropy loss of these predictions,
units.translation: 。第四步，按照第 9 章第 9.4 节计算这些预测的交叉熵损失

units.source: , as described in Chapter 9, Section 9.4. Fifth, we fit a kernel density estimator (KDE) on the array of negative cross-entropy losses,
units.translation: 。第五步，对负交叉熵损失数组

units.source: , to derive its cumulative distribution function,
units.translation: 拟合核密度估计器（KDE），得到其累积分布函数

units.source: . Sixth, we estimate the microstructural information at time
units.translation: 。第六步，微观结构信息在时点

units.source: This microstructural information can be understood as the complexity faced by market makers' decision models. Under normal market conditions, market makers produce informed forecasts with low cross-entropy loss, and are able to profit from providing liquidity to position takers. However, in the presence of (asymmetrically) informed traders, market makers produce uninformed forecasts, as measured by high cross-entropy loss, and they are adversely selected. In other words, microstructural information can only be defined and measured relative to the predictive power of market makers. The implication is that
units.translation: 这种微观结构信息可以理解为做市商决策模型面对的复杂度。正常市场条件下，做市商能作出有信息依据、交叉熵损失较低的预测，并通过向流动性需求方提供流动性获利。但当掌握不对称信息的交易者出现时，做市商的预测会变得缺乏信息依据，表现为交叉熵损失较高，并因此遭受逆向选择。换言之，微观结构信息只能相对于做市商的预测能力来定义和衡量。这意味着

units.source: should become an important feature in your financial ML toolkit.
units.translation: 应成为金融机器学习工具箱中的重要特征。

units.source: Consider the events of the flash crash of May 6, 2010. Market makers wrongly predicted that their passive quotes sitting on the bid could be filled and sold back at a higher level. The crash was not caused by a single inaccurate prediction, but by the accumulation of thousands of prediction errors (Easley et al.
units.translation: 以 2010 年 5 月 6 日闪电崩盘为例。做市商错误地以为，挂在买盘上的被动报价成交后，还能在更高价位卖出。崩盘并非由一次错误预测造成，而是成千上万次预测错误累积的结果（Easley 等人

units.source: ). If market makers had monitored the rising cross-entropy loss of their predictions, they would have recognized the presence of informed traders and the dangerously rising probability of adverse selection. That would have allowed them to widen the bid-ask spread to levels that would have stopped the order flow imbalance, as sellers would no longer have been willing to sell at those discounts. Instead, market makers kept providing liquidity to sellers at exceedingly generous levels, until eventually they were forced to stop-out, triggering a liquidity crisis that shocked markets, regulators, and academics for months and years.
units.translation: ）。如果做市商一直监控预测交叉熵损失的上升，就会意识到知情交易者已经出现，而且遭受逆向选择的概率正危险地攀升。这样，他们本可把买卖价差扩大到足以遏制订单流失衡的程度，因为卖方不会再愿意以如此大的折价卖出。实际情况却是，做市商仍以对卖方极其慷慨的价格不断提供流动性，直到最终被迫止损出场，引发流动性危机；这场危机在随后数月乃至数年里持续震动市场、监管机构和学术界。
